nodes.name: Run an Actor and get dataset(Google Maps)
Append or update row in sheet
Append or update row in sheet2

parameters.jsCode:
const formData = $('Google Maps Form1').item.json;

const splitField = (val) => {
  if (!val) return null;
  if (Array.isArray(val)) return val.map(v => v.toLowerCase()).filter(v => v !== '');
  if (typeof val === 'string' && val.trim() !== '') return val.split(',').map(v => v.trim().toLowerCase()).filter(v => v !== '');
  return null;
};

const body = {
  searchStringsArray: [formData['Search Keyword']],
  locationQuery: Array.isArray(formData['Location'])
    ? formData['Location'].join(', ')
    : formData['Location'],
  maxCrawledPlacesPerSearch: parseInt(formData['Max Places']),
  language: 'en',
  searchMatching: 'all',
  placeMinimumStars: '',
  website: 'allPlaces',
  skipClosedPlaces: false,
  scrapePlaceDetailPage: false,
  scrapeTableReservationProvider: false,
  scrapeOrderOnline: false,
  includeWebResults: false,
  scrapeDirectories: false,
  maxQuestions: 0,
  scrapeContacts: false,
  scrapeSocialMediaProfiles: {
    facebooks: false,
    instagrams: false,
    youtubes: false,
    tiktoks: false,
    twitters: false
  },
  maximumLeadsEnrichmentRecords: 2,
  leadsEnrichmentDepartments: ['c_suite', 'operations','marketing'],
  verifyLeadsEnrichmentEmails: false,
  maxReviews: 0,
  reviewsStartDate: '2024-01-01',
  reviewsSort: 'newest',
  reviewsFilterString: '',
  reviewsOrigin: 'all',
  scrapeReviewsPersonalData: false,
  maxImages: 0,
  scrapeImageAuthors: false,
  countryCode: '',
  state: '',
  county: '',
  postalCode: '',
  startUrls: [],
  placeIds: [],
  allPlacesNoSearchAction: ''
};

const categories = splitField(formData['Category Filter']);
if (categories) body.categoryFilterWords = categories;

return body;

parameters.formDescription: Configure parameters for Google Maps scraper

values.placeholder: e.g. baby clothing store, towel shop

message.content: =You are a lead qualification bot. You only ever respond with one word: either Qualified or Disqualified. No explanation. No punctuation. No extra text. One word only.

=Research the following company and determine if they are a potential buyer for baby and children's textile products: baby hooded towels, baby blankets, swaddle sets, muslin wraps, newborn bath sets, washcloths, children's towels, kids robes, crib fitted sheets, baby throws, and baby or children's clothing and apparel.

Company Name: {{ $json['Company'] }}
Website: {{ $json['Website'] }}

STEP 1 — RESEARCH THE COMPANY THOROUGHLY. Do all of the following:
- Visit the homepage and read it in full
- Find and explore their Products, Shop, Collections, or Categories pages
- Check their About page to understand their business type
- Look for any baby, infant, newborn, toddler, nursery, or children's section
- Run this search: site:{{ $json['Website'] }} baby OR infant OR toddler OR children OR kids OR towel OR blanket OR swaddle OR bedding OR nursery
- Run this search: "{{ $json['Company'] }}" baby towels OR children textiles OR kids bedding OR infant products OR baby clothing

STEP 2 — APPLY THESE QUALIFICATION RULES:

Qualify if the company matches ANY of these:
- Sells or stocks baby or children's textile products (towels, blankets, swaddles, robes, washcloths, muslin, bedding, bath sets, or any clothing and apparel for ages 0 to 8)
- Is a baby or kids specialty retailer that sells soft goods or clothing
- Is a department store, hypermarket, or pharmacy chain that stocks baby textile products or baby clothing
- Is a wholesale distributor or importer of baby or children's textile goods or apparel
- Is a maternity hospital or newborn care facility that procures baby textiles
- Sells baby gift sets, newborn hampers, or nursery bundles that include textile items or clothing
- Is an e-commerce store with a baby or children's category that includes soft goods or apparel

Disqualify only if the company does not meet any of the qualification points above.

Reply with one word only: Qualified or Disqualified.
